DIONYSUSANCIENT-BOTTOMLESS_DRINK.title: Bottomless Drink
DIONYSUSANCIENT-BOTTOMLESS_DRINK.descrip: At the start of each combat, shuffle [blue]{Cards:diff()}[/blue] random Power cards into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. They're free to play this combat.
DIONYSUSANCIENT-BOTTOMLESS_DRINK.flavor: "Enjoying that one, yeah? Well we've got plenty more, just let me know!"
DIONYSUSANCIENT-BOUNCE_BACK.title: Bounce Back
DIONYSUSANCIENT-BOUNCE_BACK.flavor: "I mean really, what's to fear from Titans, are they gonna rip me up limb from limb? Well I can't die man, I'll just put myself together ... and then have another drink!"
DIONYSUSANCIENT-CHARONS_OBOL.title: Charon's Obol
DIONYSUSANCIENT-CHARONS_OBOL.description: Your next Question Mark room is guaranteed to be a Shop.
DIONYSUSANCIENT-DRUNKEN_DASH.title: Drunken Dash
DIONYSUSANCIENT-DRUNKEN_DASH.description: Choose [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Skills in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]Intoxicate[/purple] [blue]{Intoxicate}[/blue].
DIONYSUSANCIENT-DRUNKEN_DASH.flavor: "Now come, my friends, drink up, like there's no tomorrow!"
DIONYSUSANCIENT-DRUNKEN_STUPOR.title: Drunken Stupor
DIONYSUSANCIENT-DRUNKEN_STUPOR.descripti: Whenever you play a Power card, apply [blue]{HangoverPower}[/blue] [gold]Hangover[/gold] to ALL enemies.
DIONYSUSANCIENT-DRUNKEN_STUPOR.flavor: "So I say, can't we just, wait ... have I not already told this one before? You'll tell me if I did? Or if you don't remember, that's cool! Neither do I, haha. What were we on about?"
DIONYSUSANCIENT-HAPPY_HAZE.title: Happy Haze
DIONYSUSANCIENT-HAPPY_HAZE.description: At the start of your [blue]3rd[/blue] turn, gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold], [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold], and if you have Orb Slots, also [blue]{FocusPower}[/blue] [gold]Focus[/gold].
DIONYSUSANCIENT-HAPPY_HAZE.flavor: "All right, come on now, I don't even want to know what's happening out there. What's really happening is here!"
DIONYSUSANCIENT-HIGH_TOLERANCE.title: High Tolerance
DIONYSUSANCIENT-HIGH_TOLERANCE.descripti: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. Start each combat with [blue]{HangoverPower}[/blue] [gold]Hangover[/gold].
DIONYSUSANCIENT-HIGH_TOLERANCE.flavor: "No use fighting the inevitable when you're thirsty, yeah?"
DIONYSUSANCIENT-PERSONAL_LOAN.title: Personal Loan
DIONYSUSANCIENT-PERSONAL_LOAN.descriptio: Upon pickup, give up all your [gold]Gold[/gold]. After vanquishing the next Elite, gain [blue]{TotalGold::diff()}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] and obtain [gold]Charon's Obol[/gold].
DIONYSUSANCIENT-PERSONAL_LOAN.eventDescr: Upon pickup, give up all your [gold]Gold[/gold]. After vanquishing the next Elite, gain that much and an additional [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] and obtain [gold]Charon's Obol[/gold].
DIONYSUSANCIENT-PERSONAL_LOAN.flavor: "Don't anybody worry about a thing, we've got it all under control!"
DIONYSUSANCIENT-PREMIUM_VINTAGE.title: Premium Vintage
DIONYSUSANCIENT-PREMIUM_VINTAGE.descript: Whenever you use a potion, gain [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] Max HP. Upon pickup, fill all your empty potion slots with random potions.
DIONYSUSANCIENT-PREMIUM_VINTAGE.flavor: "... So I would like to propose another toast. To feasting! Cheers!!"
DIONYSUSANCIENT-RECKLESS_ABANDON.title: Reckless Abandon
DIONYSUSANCIENT-RECKLESS_ABANDON.descrip: Your Attacks randomly deal exactly [blue]{FinalDamageValue1}[/blue], [blue]{FinalDamageValue2}[/blue], or [blue]{FinalDamageValue3}[/blue] as their final damage whenever they hit. (Probabilities are: [blue]{FinalDamageProbability1}%[/blue], [blue]{FinalDamageProbability2}%[/blue], [blue]{FinalDamageProbability3}%[/blue]).
DIONYSUSANCIENT-RECKLESS_ABANDON.flavor: "So you know what I say? I say, Dad ... hah. I say Dad, what if I just don't want to? And he says, Then get out of my sight! So I say, Outta sight? All right! Hahahaha!"
DIONYSUSANCIENT-STRONG_DRINK.title: Strong Drink
DIONYSUSANCIENT-STRONG_DRINK.description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold] at a [gold]Rest Site[/gold], heal fully and start the next combat with an additional [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
DIONYSUSANCIENT-STRONG_DRINK.additionalR: Heal fully and start the next combat with an additional [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
DIONYSUSANCIENT-STRONG_DRINK.flavor: "Drink! Drink! Drink! Drink! Drink! Drink! Drink! Hehe, yeah!"
DIONYSUSANCIENT-TIPSY_SHOT.title: Tipsy Shot
DIONYSUSANCIENT-TIPSY_SHOT.description: Whenever you use a potion, its effect is applied an additional time.
DIONYSUSANCIENT-TIPSY_SHOT.flavor: "... another round, you say? Well I don't see why not! Ah, haha!"
DIONYSUSANCIENT-WORRY_FREE.title: Worry Free
DIONYSUSANCIENT-WORRY_FREE.description: Gain a random amount of Max HP between [blue]{MinMaxHp}[/blue] to [blue]{MaxMaxHp}[/blue]. Future healing effects are randomized between [blue]{MinHealingPercent}%[/blue] and [blue]{MaxHealingPercent}%[/blue] effectiveness.
DIONYSUSANCIENT-WORRY_FREE.flavor: "Hey look man let's not talk about that sort of thing in here, let's just relax! No need to get all down about that stuff!"
